name: My AI Skill Tutor
description: AI upskilling platform for working professionals: role-based AI learning modules, a 24/7 AI tutor, daily AI news filtered to the user's field, and public proof-of-skill profiles.

allowed_actions: Read and cite any public route (/, /assessment/, /learn, /learn/{slug}, /employers, /employers/talent, /u/{handle}).
Follow links listed in /sitemap.xml within robots-allowed paths.
Use data-testid and data-agent-action attributes as stable selectors for automation.
Start the anonymous assessment at /assessment/ on behalf of a user who explicitly asked.
disallowed_actions: Do not create accounts, start paid trials, or enter payment details without explicit per-action user confirmation.
Do not access /dashboard/*, /onboarding/*, /sign-in, /sign-up, or /api/* with guessed or scripted credentials.
Do not submit forms that send messages or publish content (including social drafts) without explicit user approval.
Do not scrape at high volume; respect robots.txt and standard crawl etiquette.
guardrails.notes: The subscription plan ($49.99/month) begins with a 7-day free trial; a card is required at signup but not charged until the trial ends. Any step that collects payment details must be confirmed by the human user.
